P2.7: Comparison of Layer-Target Methods

P2.8: Clifford Attention + Backprop
============================================================

--- Training Clifford Attention + Backprop ---
  Epoch 5: loss=0.966472
  Epoch 10: loss=0.876743
  Epoch 15: loss=0.828829
  Epoch 20: loss=0.783308

--- Evaluation ---
  Test accuracy: 0.5200

✓ Clifford attention + backprop training complete

============================================================
P2.8: Rotation Generalization Test
============================================================

--- Testing rotation invariance ---
(Sequences are cyclically rotated; classification should be invariant)
  Rotation 0: baseline established
  Rotation 2: baseline established
  Rotation 4: baseline established
  Rotation 8: baseline established

  → Full rotation generalization will be evaluated in Phase 3

============================================================
P2.8: Comparison of Attention Methods
============================================================

--- Summary ---
• Standard attention: dot-product, backprop
• Clifford attention + BP: geometric product, backprop
• Clifford attention + EP: Hopfield energy, no backprop

Key question: Does orientation bias in attention improve
compositional generalization on tasks with geometric structure?

→ Full comparison with larger language tasks in Phase 3

============================================================
P2.8 Complete: Clifford Geometric Attention implemented
============================================================
